en: Welcome to English in a minute. These are dice. But what do you think the
ko: English in a minute에 오신 걸 환영합니다

en: So Anna, is your tree-cutting party still on this weekend?
ko: 들어보죠. Anna, 이번 주말 나무 자르기 파티 아직 하는 거야? 응

en: Yes, although the weather could be dicey. Lightning, thunder, maybe a tornado.
Well, cutting down a tree in a storm sounds very dicey. And dumb.
Nah, it'll be fine. What could go wrong?
ko: 에이 괜찮을 거야. 뭐가 잘못될 수 있겠어?

en: There is no way to predict how dice are going to roll.
ko: 주사위가 어떻게 굴러갈지 예측할 수 없잖아요. 그래서 dicey는

en: So dicey describes something that is unpredictable or risky.
ko: 예측할 수 없거나 위험한 것을 설명해요. dicey는 다양한 것에 쓸 수 있어요

en: You can use dicey when talking about lots of things.
The weather, a physical activity, or even a business decision.
ko: 날씨, 신체 활동, 사업 결정 등

en: And that's English in a minute.
